name: Internet Transformer
description: Turn the page you are viewing into a new interactive experience.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; connect-src http://localhost:* ws://localhost:* https://*.workers.dev wss://*.workers.dev;
content_security_policy.sandbox: sandbox allow-scripts; default-src 'none'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; child-src 'self' data: blob:; frame-src 'self' data: blob:; img-src https: http: data: blob:; media-src https: http: data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'none'; form-action 'none'; object-src 'none';
